title: Feat: Save - Restrict Saved
original_text:
• Implemented the rule: only Gemini-generated commit messages can be saved into
  commit_examples_data/entries.

  Changed:

  - smart_commit_ai/service.py:50: auto-save now only writes when message.source == "gemini".
  - smart_commit_ai/gui.py:17: manual Save Example now only accepts the unchanged last Gemini
    result.
  - README.md:51: documented the save policy.
  - tests/test_smart_commit.py:136: added save-policy tests.

  I also removed the bad local-generated dataset entry:
  commit_examples_data/entries/599-ui-update-it-so-gemini-key-is-saved-locally.json

  Verification passed:

  - 10 tests OK
  - compileall passed
